## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focus: Prioritize wedding/portrait photography, business tips, and pose ideas](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [New content workflow: GrowthX to send 5-6 outlines every Monday for approval](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Content expansion: Repurpose podcast/YouTube content into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Photographer involvement: Explore adding expert quotes/tips to articles](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Planning

  - [Published 3 articles this week; 2 more in editing stage](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [4 out of 5 outlines approved; rejected "photographer vests" topic](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [New workflow: GrowthX to send 5-6 outlines every Monday for approval](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Content focus: wedding/portrait photography, business tips, pricing, client acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Potential content series: 20-40 articles on various poses (e.g., couple poses, groom poses)](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Content Ideas and Resources

  - [Utilize AfterShoot's Facebook community for topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Reference shoot.edit website for content inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

  - [Consider creating articles from existing podcasts (12-13 episodes) and YouTube videos](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)

### SEO and Keyword Research

  - [Team to research new keywords based on today's discussion](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Focus on top-of-funnel, non-product-led content](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Utilize interlinking strategy for pose-related content to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/cFSpkzf1zRUJwy_AbHbdbNuzG_w6xnHa?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy
